title: Misandra lobata
intro:
I couldn't find much information about the plant 'Misandra lobata'. However, it is possible that it's a different name or classification for a different plant. If you are referring to 'Misandra' which is often known as 'Mimusops', it is a genus of evergreen trees, commonly known as the red milkwood.

The health benefits of Mimusops trees are primarily derived from their bark, which has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. 

The bioactive constituents of Mimusops include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties.

The most common herbal preparations made from Mimusops include teas, tinctures, and ointments, which are used to treat various ailments such as fever, sore throats, and skin conditions.
